decision: For Wisdom, KJV and NABRE active lane text must match the bound source text without embedded verse-reference prefixes. Where the bound KJV/NABRE source has a displayed book/chapter/verse address absent from the active file, add a source-address row for that lane only. Do not synthesize NRSV, DRB, Rotherham, or rawText into those rows.
allowedActions: strip embedded KJV/NABRE verse-reference prefixes only where the stripped text exactly equals the bound source text at the same ref
insert KJV/NABRE-only source-address rows for 17:20, 17:21, 19:20, and 19:21
record DRB as exact-source-collated from the existing strict audit result
nextRequiredWork: Run bounded Wisdom KJV/NABRE prefix and source-address repair.
Run strict source collation audit for KJV/NABRE/DRB.
Record Wisdom partial trust only if the audit passes; keep full Wisdom trust blocked pending NRSV.
